statement: In every magma, Equation 2780 (`x = ((y * z) * (x * z)) * z`) implies Equation 4363 (`x * (y * z) = y * (x * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0253
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y z) (op x z)) z)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x (op y z)) = (op y (op x w))
